author: klueiklue
title: Thank God I found this
content: I hope they keep this, and even without the premium, it looks like one!!! Thank you for this!!!

author: stroberry1001
title: feedback
content: is a great app.. but would be better if have the option to make all the tracks the same volume automatically, because i download my tracks from different sources and some are louder than others so i end up having to keep changing my volume

author: IainM4bz
title: Stuttery playback??
content: Music has occasional glitches while playing..fix??? Gets annoying

author: ZeckTH
title: Cheap for pro and functions as promised!
content: Could add a light/dark theme (follows system) . And the player UI could also follow the theme

author: MelroseSingapore
title: Nice App with Annoying full screen ads all time.
content: This is a good app for music lovers and recently a lot of  annoying apps are popping up.  Now I am looking for another option and hope I will get it soon.  I know this is a great app with free version, but ads are keep on popping up.

author: Steven CZQ
title: great audio player.. perhaps the best one in Apple App store.
content:
user friendly even for a strict app user like me.
if it comes with stereo speakers controlling function, I will give a 5 stars review. this function would be very useful for musical instrument practice.

author: Debbir^^
title: Can’t play next song naturally
content: When I play music in the background, the song goes to next song naturally but the song track doesn’t change. Pls fix this.

author: Hoe Teck Hwa
title: Nice Music App but Can be Better
content:
1) I’ve just made an in-app purchase in the hope that I can download the album art from the internet.  But it stays the same.    Nothing downloaded.

2) I’ve transferred some .jpeg images files to the “Downloads” folder via WIFI Drive transfer from my PC.  The manual selection of album art to pick the image from this folder works (thankfully).  However, when I go to “Files” tab and click on the “Downloads” folder, the image files cannot be displayed.  How do I delete these files, without removing the whole folder?

3) What’s the difference between the free version with in-app purchase (I’ve made the purchase) and the EverMusic Pro version?

4) Lastly, is there plan to support lyrics?

Great music app though, despite the above issues.
Recommended to all music lovers.

author: Rich KOH
title: Great app!
content: Easy to use interface. Let you manage music easily when used with dropbox. Highly recommended.

author: Mohamed 1971
title: Evermusic
content: Evermusic - Can listen from ipod library, download from other app, access to multiple online storage , change ID3 tag and a good equalizer with extra sound boost. Value for money. Can try before purchase. Welldone developers 👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻.

author: RARAPONG
title: Good and bad
content: I love that it can play directly from my Dropbox but it seems like either the repeat track function isn't working or background play isn't supported. When I set my only track in the folder to be on repeat, it plays only once and stops.
